name: AzureDevopsConnector
description: Connects to the Azure DevOps Services REST API (Projects, Teams, Users, Repos, Pull Requests, Work Items via WIQL, Builds, Pipelines, Releases) using Personal Access Token (PAT) authentication. Auth is HTTP Basic with an empty username + the PAT as the password. Every request carries the api-version query parameter.

install_fields.label: Organization
install_fields.help: Your Azure DevOps organization slug — the {org} segment of https://dev.azure.com/{org}.

install_fields.label: Personal Access Token
install_fields.help: Create at User Settings → Personal Access Tokens. Scope the PAT to the surfaces you need (Code, Work Items, Build, Release). The PAT is sent HTTP-Basic-encoded with an empty username — never as a Bearer token.

install_fields.label: API Version
install_fields.help: Azure DevOps REST API version. Sent as ?api-version=<value> on every request. Leave blank to use 7.1.

install_fields.label: Default Project
install_fields.help: Default project name used by sync() and by methods that omit the project argument.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Maximum Azure DevOps API requests per minute. Default is 200.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates organization + pat (Personal Access Token) and persists the install-time configuration. Does NOT call the API.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Probes GET /_apis/projects?$top=1&api-version=7.1 with the configured PAT to verify connectivity + auth.

apis.name: List Projects
apis.description: GET /_apis/projects — list Azure DevOps projects in the organization. Supports stateFilter + $top + continuationToken.

apis.name: Get Project
apis.description: GET /_apis/projects/{idOrName} — fetch a single project by ID or name.

apis.name: List Teams
apis.description: GET /_apis/projects/{project}/teams — list teams under a project.

apis.name: List Users
apis.description: GET https://vssps.dev.azure.com/{org}/_apis/graph/users — list users via the Graph API host.

apis.name: List Repositories
apis.description: GET /{project}/_apis/git/repositories — list Git repositories for a project.

apis.name: Get Repository
apis.description: GET /{project}/_apis/git/repositories/{repositoryId} — fetch a single Git repository.

apis.name: List Pull Requests
apis.description: GET /{project}/_apis/git/repositories/{repo}/pullrequests — list PRs. Filter by status (active|completed|abandoned|all).

apis.name: Get Pull Request
apis.description: GET /{project}/_apis/git/repositories/{repo}/pullrequests/{pullRequestId}.

apis.name: Create Pull Request
apis.description: POST /{project}/_apis/git/repositories/{repo}/pullrequests — open a PR between two branches.

apis.name: Query Work Items (WIQL)
apis.description: POST /{project}/_apis/wit/wiql — execute a WIQL query and return work-item REFs (id+url) only.

apis.name: List Work Items (WIQL + batch fetch)
apis.description: Runs a WIQL query against a project, then batch-fetches the full work items via GET /_apis/wit/workitems?ids=...

apis.name: Get Work Item
apis.description: GET /_apis/wit/workitems/{id} — fetch a single work item with optional field projection.

apis.name: Create Work Item
apis.description: POST /{project}/_apis/wit/workitems/${type} — JSON-patch body (Content-Type: application/json-patch+json).

apis.name: Update Work Item
apis.description: PATCH /_apis/wit/workitems/{id} — JSON-patch body (Content-Type: application/json-patch+json).

apis.name: List Builds
apis.description: GET /{project}/_apis/build/builds — list builds with optional statusFilter (inProgress|completed|cancelling|...).

apis.name: Get Build
apis.description: GET /{project}/_apis/build/builds/{buildId} — fetch a single build.

apis.name: Queue Build
apis.description: POST /{project}/_apis/build/builds — queue a new build for a given definition. parameters is JSON-encoded into the body string.

apis.name: List Pipelines
apis.description: GET /{project}/_apis/pipelines — list YAML pipelines in a project.

apis.name: List Releases
apis.description: GET https://vsrm.dev.azure.com/{org}/{project}/_apis/release/releases — list classic-RM releases.
